circularplace.title: CircularPlace
circularplace.description: Startup environment — joined a small team and set up CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Docker Swarm), designed APIs and web interfaces, integrated Stripe for payments and Zitadel for multi-tenant authentication. Code reviews and sprint planning.

capency.title: CAPENCY
capency.description: Managed a team of 4-6 developers in an Agile environment. Integrated Google and Apple Wallet APIs to digitize loyalty cards, built web tools, CI/CD pipelines, managed servers and synchronized with Salesforce.

flit.title: Flit Sport
flit.description: Built from scratch a mobile-first web application generating intelligent training plans for runners.

hguitare.title: HGuitare
hguitare.description: Led the complete redesign and refactoring of an online guitar learning platform serving thousands of active students.

creuch.title: Creuch
creuch.description: CREUCH is a short-circuit sales platform connecting artisans and producers directly with consumers.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: Creation of a Portfolio website showcasing my experiences and projects as a developer.

movies.title: Movies App
movies.description: Mobile application for searching movies and browsing new releases.

sportsvillage.title: Sports Village
sportsvillage.description: E-commerce platform for selling sports equipment.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: With over 10 years of experience in web development, I've mastered a comprehensive technology stack spanning modern frontend frameworks, robust backend solutions, and DevOps practices. From startup MVPs to enterprise-scale applications, I bring technical expertise and a passion for building elegant, performant solutions that make a real impact.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Open to exciting opportunities — whether you're building the next big startup or need an experienced developer for your project. Let's discuss how we can work together to bring your vision to life.
